zh: 先告诉我，宣传册的源文件在你那里吗？
en: First, tell me — do you have the brochure source files on your computer?

zh: 这确实很麻烦。印刷厂的机器坏了，我们时间又不多了。
en: This is really a pain. The printing press broke down, and we're running out of time.

zh: 如果今天印不出来，发布会就赶不上了。
en: If we can't get it printed today, we'll miss the launch event.

zh: ……在我电脑里。
en: ......They're on my laptop.

zh: 那就好办了。
en: Then we're in luck.

zh: 印刷厂的机器不行，我们可以找数码快印店。虽然成本高一点，但今天就能印好。
en: If the press is down, we can use a digital print shop. It'll cost more, but they can have it done today.

zh: 不过我们需要重新调整颜色参数，把偏差修正过来。
en: We'll just need to recalibrate the color settings to fix the offset.

zh: 真的吗？可是……重新调整颜色要花很长时间的。
en: Really? But... recalibrating the colors would take forever.

zh: 没关系，我陪你一起改。
en: No worries. I'll help you fix it.

zh: 大不了通宵一晚上，肯定能赶在明天早上印好。
en: Even if we have to pull an all-nighter, we'll get it done by morning.

zh: ……可是你的作业怎么办？你不是说这周要交课程设计吗？
en: ......But what about your assignment? Didn't you say your project is due this week?

zh: 作业可以晚点交，但你的发布会不能推迟。
en: I can turn in my homework late. Your launch event can't be postponed.

zh: 我说过，我是你的专属设计师兼摄影师。你的事，就是我的事。
en: I told you — I'm your personal designer and photographer. Your problems are my problems.

zh: （小声）林辰……
en: (softly) Lin Chen......

zh: 这里的红色再加深一点……还有这个银色，要更亮一点。
en: Let's deepen the red here a bit... and make this silver brighter.

zh: 不行，再亮就会显得廉价了。稍微降低一点饱和度，增加一点灰度。
en: No, any brighter and it'll look cheap. Dial the saturation down a notch and add a touch of gray.

zh: 嗯，有道理。
en: Mm-hmm, good point.

zh: （打了个哈欠）好累啊……
en: (yawns) I'm so tired......

zh: 给你买的咖啡，提提神。
en: I got you some coffee. Wake you up a bit.

zh: 谢谢。
en: Thanks.

zh: 喂，林辰。你说你这么帮我，是不是喜欢我啊？
en: Hey, Lin Chen. You're going this far to help me... you like me, don't you?

zh: （差点把咖啡喷出来）你胡说什么呢。
en: (nearly spits out his coffee) What are you even talking about?

zh: 切，不说就算了。
en: Tch. Fine, don't admit it.

zh: （小声嘟囔）明明就是……
en: (muttering under her breath) As if it's not obvious...

zh: 林辰。对不起啊，耽误你这么多时间。
en: Lin Chen. I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time.

zh: 没事。能帮到你就好。
en: It's fine. I'm glad I could help.

zh: 其实……我以前从来没有和别人一起工作过。
en: The thing is... I've never really worked with anyone before.

zh: 我总是觉得，别人做的东西都达不到我的要求，所以什么事都自己扛着。
en: I always felt like no one else's work would meet my standards, so I just carried everything myself.

zh: 但是和你一起工作，我觉得很安心。
en: But working with you... it feels safe. I feel at ease.

zh: （心里一阵温暖。）以后有什么事，都可以告诉我。不用一个人硬撑着。
en: (A warmth spreads through his heart.) From now on, whatever happens, you can tell me. You don't have to tough it out alone.

zh: 太好了！终于改完了！
en: Yes! Finally done!

zh: 是啊。现在发给店家，早上八点就能印好。
en: Yeah. Send it to the shop now, and it'll be ready by eight in the morning.

zh: 发送成功！终于可以回家睡觉了！
en: Sent! Now I can finally go home and crash!

zh: 哇，雨下得好大啊。
en: Whoa, it's really pouring out there.

zh: 我带了伞。走吧，我送你回宿舍。
en: I brought an umbrella. Come on, I'll walk you back to your dorm.

zh: 喂，伞歪了。
en: Hey, the umbrella's tilted.

zh: 没有啊，正好。
en: No it's not. It's perfectly straight.

zh: 明明就歪了！你都淋湿了！笨蛋……
en: It is too! You're soaked! Idiot......

zh: 我到了。你的肩膀都湿透了……回去赶紧洗个热水澡，别感冒了。
en: I'm here. Your shoulder's drenched... go take a hot shower when you get back. Don't catch a cold.

zh: 知道了。你也赶紧上去休息吧。
en: Got it. You should head upstairs and rest too.

zh: 今天……真的谢谢你。如果没有你，我真的不知道该怎么办。
en: Today... I really mean it, thank you. If it weren't for you, I don't know what I would've done.

zh: 晚安，林辰。
en: Good night, Lin Chen.

zh: 晚安。
en: Good night.

zh: 宣传册印好了！效果特别好！你醒了吗？我请你吃饭！
en: The brochures are done! They look amazing! Are you awake? I'm treating you to a meal!

zh: 你怎么了？哪里不舒服？
en: What's wrong? Are you feeling unwell?

zh: 没事，就是有点发烧，睡一觉就好了。
en: It's nothing. Just running a bit of a fever. I'll be fine after some sleep.

zh: 发烧？多少度？
en: A fever? What's your temperature?

zh: 不知道……没量。
en: No idea... didn't check.

zh: 你等着！我马上过来！
en: Stay there! I'm coming over right now!

zh: 哎？不用了，我真的没事……
en: Huh? No, don't — I'm really fine......

zh: （气喘吁吁）你怎么样了？
en: (out of breath) How are you feeling?

zh: 没事……就是有点晕。
en: Okay... just a bit dizzy.

zh: 快回床上躺着去！来，量一下体温。
en: Get back in bed right now! Here, let me take your temperature.

zh: 都烧成这样了还说没事！你是不是傻啊！
en: A fever this high and you say it's nothing! Are you an idiot?!

zh: 哪有那么严重……
en: It's not that bad......

zh: 39度2！还说不严重！你等着，我去给你买药！
en: 39.2! And you still say it's not bad?! Wait here, I'm getting you medicine!

zh: 来，吃药。
en: Here, take your medicine.

zh: 你饿不饿？我给你煮点粥吧。
en: Are you hungry? I'll make you some congee.

zh: 你会煮粥？
en: You know how to cook congee?

zh: 当然会！你别小看人！
en: Of course I do! Don't underestimate me!

zh: 粥来了！
en: Congee's ready!

zh: （看着碗里黑乎乎的东西）这……这是粥？
en: (staring at the dark lumpy thing in the bowl) This... this is congee?

zh: 呃……可能火有点大了……不过应该能吃！
en: Uhh... the heat might've been a bit too high... but it should still be edible!

zh: （味道一言难尽，但看着她期待的眼神，我还是全部吃完了。）好吃。
en: (The taste defies description, but faced with her hopeful eyes, I finish every last bite.) It's good.

zh: 真的吗？那我以后经常做给你吃！
en: Really? Then I'll make it for you all the time!

zh: （连忙摆手）不用不用！太麻烦你了！
en: (waves his hands frantically) No no no! That's way too much trouble!

zh: 切，好心没好报。
en: Hmph, no good deed goes unpunished.

zh: 感觉怎么样了？
en: How are you feeling now?

zh: 好多了，谢谢你。
en: Much better. Thank you.

zh: 对不起……都是因为我，你才会生病的。
en: I'm sorry... it's all my fault you got sick.
